text.title: Solo Pivot Decision ‚ÄĒ Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `PivotDecision`. Must satisfy this contract before returning to operator.

list.item: `pivot_type` ‚ÄĒ enum {segment, feature, business-model, tech, channel, restart}
`evidence_signals` ‚ÄĒ array of triggering metrics with baseline values
`single_axis_check` ‚ÄĒ object proving only ONE pivot dimension changes

antipattern.reason: Violates r1. Multi-axis pivots get relabelled by r5 to "restart" or rejected.
Violates r2. A pivot without a kill criterion never dies; founder bleeds out.
Violates r3. If no learning survives, this is a restart per r5.
Violates r4. Insufficient runway forces sunset regardless of pivot quality.

antipattern.description: `evidence_signals` contains aspirations ("I think users would want X") not measured metrics.
antipattern.reason: Pivots are triggered by data, not founder feelings.

list.item: Express MRR baselines as YoY delta % if absolute is sensitive.
Aggregate cohort metrics by month if signal is weekly-noisy.

text.reference: JSON Schema the output validates against.

list.item: Hypothesis has metric + baseline + target + deadline + kill-criterion.
Recommended action consistent with metric evidence.
